verses.text: Topa aw, khang tawntungin kote' omna mun na hi hi
Mual liante a kipian'sak ma, leitang leh leitung na bawl ma pek, a tawntunga kipan a tawntung dongin Pasian na hi hi
Mi, leivui na suaksakkik a, “Mihingte aw, ciahkik un,” na ci hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma muhna-ah kum tul khat a bei ciangin zanni ahi a, zan ihmut laitakin khan'lawh khat sung tawh ahi zongin a kibang bek hi
Nangmah in mite na phiatkhia hi. Amaute pen a ihmu tawh kibang uh a, zingsangin a nokik lopa tawh kibang uh hi
Zingsangin palhin thaksuak kik a, nitak ciangin vulin a keu uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma sinsona in kote hong susia a, na hehluatna in kote hong lausak gawp hi
Nangmah in ka mawhnate uh na mai-ah na koih a, ka khialh simnate uh na maitangah na koih hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ka hun khempeuh uh na hehna-in bei a, ka nuntak hun uh husan' khat bangin a bei hi
Kote' nuntak sung kum sawmsagih bang hi a, cidam le-ung kum sawmgiat bang hithei hi. Ahih hangin tua hunsung nangawn gimna leh haksatna hi a, tua hunte bei pakin kote ka maimang uh hi
Nang hong kizahtakna dingin na sinsona' vangliatna kua in thei a, na hehna' husiatna kua in thei ahi hiam
Tua ahih ciangin pilna lungsim ka ngah theihna dingun ka nuntak hun uh a tomlam ka theihna dingun hong hilh in
Topa aw, hong kihei kik in. Bang tan sauvei ding hiam? Na nasemte hong hehpih in
Ka nuntak tawntung uh lungdamin ka kipak theihna dingun zingsangin na itna kip tawh kote hong lungkimsak in
Kote nong gimsak ni zah, siatna ka thuak uh kum phazah mah, kote hong kipaksak in
Na nasemte tungah na nasepna, a tate uh tungah na minthan'na, na vang hong kilangsak in
Kote' Topa Pasian aw, kote tungah na thupha hong tungsak in la, kote' nasepna khempeuh hong tangtungsak in.
